meaning: n.能发出哔哔声音的仪器
examples: His beeper sounded and he picked up the telephone.
Find a beeper and deposit it on the origin.
What is the location of each beeper in the world?
She began to remove the wet sheet covering El Lobo, but her beeper went off.
His Afrezza inhaler is the size of a beeper and uses a faster-dosing insulin molecule than Exubera's.
